The Homespire Difference

Working With Us Should Feel Effortless.

The best lender partnership is one you barely have to think about — where your buyers are taken care of, your pipeline is visible, and closings happen on time.

More Buyers Get to Yes

Niche programs and flexible guidelines mean fewer deals fall through and fewer buyers walk away.

Fast & Transparent

In-house processing built for speed. Milestone updates keep your team informed automatically, with no status calls.

One Team, Start to Finish

As a direct lender, we control every step. Faster answers, more flexibility, one point of contact you can rely on.

Featured Program

Builder Forward

Lower rates. More buying power. Faster sales — without cutting your price.

A Builder Forward lets you offer mortgage rates significantly below market, helping buyers qualify more easily and feel the savings every single month. Pair it with a buydown to maximize affordability and drive community traffic.

A $50,000 price cut is felt once. A lower monthly payment is felt every month.

The Builder Math: Spend $10,000 Two Ways

Price ReductionBuilder Forward
Builder Investment$10,000$10,000
Home Sale Price$340,000$350,000
Monthly Buyer Benefit~$63/mo~$225/mo
Protects Community Values✗✓
Helps Future Appraisals✗✓
Marketing AdvantageLimitedSignificant

Same builder investment. Nearly 4x the monthly payment benefit to the buyer.

Generates more buyer interest and model home traffic
Clears standing inventory faster
Preserves sales prices and neighborhood values
Available on Conventional and Government loan products
More Ways to Win the Sale

Financing Tools Built for Builders

Programs and financing strategies designed to help you stay competitive, qualify more buyers, and close faster.

One-Time Close Construction Loan

Dream it. Buy it. Build it. One loan, one closing — combining lot purchase, construction, and permanent mortgage.

  • No second appraisal required
  • Interest-only during construction
  • Conventional, FHA, VA, USDA
  • FICO scores as low as 650
Rate Buydowns

Fund a temporary rate reduction so buyers feel the affordability immediately. Pair with Builder Forward to stack the impact.

  • 3/2/1, 2/1, and 1/0 structures
  • Conventional and VA available
  • Builder or seller funded
Extended Rate Locks

Protect buyers through long build timelines without locking into worst-case timing.

  • Rate protected through closing
  • Float-down if rates improve
  • Keeps sales commitments solid
Loan Programs

More Programs Means More Buyers Get to Yes.

From first-time buyers to high-value purchases, from W-2 borrowers to self-employed buyers with non-traditional income, we have a program for the full range of buyers who walk into your communities.

Conventional

Fixed interest rate, consistent payments. Multiple term options.

FHA Loans

Down payments as low as 3.5%. Expanded credit flexibility.

VA Loans

100% financing, fewer restrictions. Approved VA lender.

USDA Loans

100% financing for homes in designated USDA areas.

Jumbo Loans

Up to $3M. As little as 5% down with FICO 740+.

Non-Traditional Income

Bank statement programs, 1099 income qualification, and asset-based qualification for self-employed and non-W-2 buyers.

Adjustable Rate

Lower initial payments for buyers planning to move or refinance.

Down Payment Assistance

Special programs to help buyers reach the closing table.

Co-Branding & Marketing

We're Not Just Your Lender. We're Your Marketing Partner.

When you work with Homespire, you get a full marketing support system designed to help you attract buyers and build your brand alongside ours.

  • Co-branded property websites and single-property sites
  • Personalized email campaigns to nurture your buyer pipeline
  • Print and PDF flyers your sales team can hand out on day one
  • Online and print advertising to drive community traffic

Co-Branded Buyer Application: A dedicated, builder-branded portal where buyers apply in minutes and you see their progress in real time.

Builder Portal: Real-time pipeline visibility, document uploads, and an upgrade cost estimator, all in one dashboard.

Automated Milestone Notifications: Buyers and your team stay informed at every stage, with zero status calls.

Licensed by the Department of Financial Protection and Innovation under the California Residential Mortgage Lending Act. *Adjustable rate mortgages (ARMs) are home loans with a rate that varies. Your interest rate and monthly principal and interest (P&I) payments will remain the same for a defined initial period, then adjust annually when that initial period is over. During the adjustable period, there will be an interest rate cap that sets a limit on how high your interest rate can go. This product is primarily for a borrower with good credit (680 FICO or better) but a low Loan-To-Value (95% max). Debt-to-income ratios apply. Investment condos not allowed. Reduction in payment is the result of builder or seller concessions used to buy down the rate and are not guaranteed by NFM Lending. 5% down payment is the responsibility of the borrower. *Lender-paid buydown available for 1 year. Reduction in payment for 2- and 3-year buydowns are the result of builder or seller concessions used to buy down the rate and are not guaranteed by NFM Lending. 5% down payment is the responsibility of the borrower. Available for fixed-rate conventional, FHA and VA. USDA also available, with a maximum two-year buydown term. Applies to new or existing home purchases only. Refinancing an existing loan may result in the total finance charges being higher over the life of the loan. LTV’s can be as high as 96.5% for FHA loans. FHA minimum FICO score required. Fixed rate loans only. W2 transcript option not permitted. Qualifying credit score needed for conventional loans. For USDA loans, 100% financing, no down payment is required. The loan amount may not exceed 100% of the appraised value, plus the guarantee fee may be included. Loan is limited to the appraised value without the pool, if applicable. Veterans Affairs loans require a funding fee, which is based on various loan characteristics. Sales price cannot exceed appraised value. All Down Payment Assistance Programs have different requirements and contingencies; please consult with the Loan Originator to discuss your options. For more information, please visit: (include link to down payment program). You will need to apply for a first mortgage loan with NFM Lending, LLC. in conjunction with any down payment assistance program. All information contained herein is subject to change at any time. A training class might be required. All DPA programs require to apply for a 1st and 2nd mortgage. NFM Lending is not a Financial Advisor, Tax Advisor or Credit Repair Company. You should consult with a Financial Advisor, Tax Advisor or Credit Repair Company to learn more. Interest rates are subject to change daily and without notice. NFM Lending is not a Financial Advisor, Credit Repair Company or Tax Consultant. Please make sure to consult your own Financial Advisor, Credit Repair Company or Tax Consultant to determine what may be best for your individual needs. All of the market information contained in this marketing material has been gathered from different mortgage sources. The important thing to remember about a home equity line of credit is the interest rate is variable and adjusts with the prime rate, which means the amount of interest you pay could fluctuate up or down following interest rate trends over the course of the draw and repayment period. Interest rates are subject to change daily and without notice. *This product is primarily for a borrower with good credit (700 FICO or better) but a low Loan-To-Value (80% max). Debt-to-income ratios apply. Investment condos not allowed. Medical student debts are not included in the debt-to-income (DTI) qualifications if they are deferred at minimum of 12 months. Cancellation of mortgage insurance has restrictions including home equity requirements. *Veterans Affairs loans require a funding fee, which is based on various loan characteristics. Sales price cannot exceed appraised value. VA 580 FICO - *Purchases only, must have Automatic Underwriting System (AUS) approval. No cash-out under 600 FICO Rates/payments flyers. *On an Interest Rate Reduction Refinance Loan (IRRRL) the Veterans Affairs does not require an appraisal, but NFM Lending may require a drive-by-appraisal. Income documentation is not required, but source of income must be verified. **Purchases only, must have Automatic Underwriting System (AUS) approval.
